productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Casual Black Laptop Bag
description: Carry your laptop in style with this bag from united colors of benetton. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for the office and general heavy duty use. Width: 45 cm Length: 30 cm Depth: 17 cm Made of polyester Has twp zippered pockets on the front and one pocket with magnetic closure One main compartment with a zippered pocket A detachable, adjustable shoulder strap Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
